title: UAP Disclosure Act Gutted in House Conference
detail: The Schumer-Rounds UAP Disclosure Act is effectively gutted during House-Senate conference on the FY2025 NDAA. Key provisions stripped include eminent domain authority over recovered materials, subpoena power, and the independent review board modeled on the JFK Assassination Records Act. Only recordkeeping and reporting provisions survive in the final bill. Defense and intelligence committee leaders, citing national security concerns, led the opposition. Advocates call it a major setback for transparency.
